raw_consumer_statement:
1- XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX Charged my Card {$23000.00} for No Service Provided. 
2- On XX/XX/year> I Disputed these fraudulent Charges with American Express XXXX Ref. No. XXXX. 
3- On XX/XX/year>XXXX XXXX XXXX Closed the Dispute with no resolution, apparently, American Express relied on False Invoices provided by XXXX XXXX XXXX, for a vehicle that they didn't perform any work on. 
4- XXXX XXXX even refused to provide me with documents to determine the validity of the debt. 
5- XXXX and American Express took advantage of my Old Age, to run this scheme, and deprive me of my right to dispute fraudulent charges.
